source: CISD Board of Trustees HR Personnel Reports, Aug 2023 – May 2026. Hires = 'Employment of Professional Personnel'; Departures = 'Personnel Resignations' + 'Personnel Retirements'. Substitute teachers and annual contract renewals excluded.
notes: Board meeting date used as record date (approval date, not effective date).
Texas fiscal year runs Sep 1 – Aug 31; Aug 2023 attributed to FY 2022-23.
Staff count unavailable; turnover rate cannot be computed from these reports.
Some PDFs embed staff names as images; those pages are processed via OCR (easyocr).
An individual may appear as both resignation and hire in the same month (rehire).
FY 2022-23 covers Aug 2023 meeting only (partial). FY 2025-26 is through May 2026 (partial).
